017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.time.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025/**
026 * In-memory {@link SessionStore} backed by a bounded-LRU map, indexed by {@code sub} and {@code sid} so
027 * it can satisfy back-channel logout.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * This is the simpler single-instance / development option.  It is lost on restart and breaks under
031 * horizontal scaling without sticky sessions; for production multi-instance deployments use
032 * {@link SignedCookieSessionStore} (stateless, the documented default) or a caller-supplied distributed
033 * store.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Eviction is the conjunction of a size cap (LRU) and per-session TTL (an expired session is treated as
037 * a miss and removed on lookup).  Because it retains sessions server-side, it
038 * {@link #supportsServerSideRevocation() supports} {@link #invalidateBySubject(String)} and
039 * {@link #invalidateBySessionId(String)}.
040 *
041 * @since 10.0.0
042 */
043public class InMemorySessionStore implements SessionStore {
044
045   /** Default maximum number of live sessions retained. */
046   public static final int DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES = 10_000;
047
048   /**
049    * Static creator with the default size cap.
050    *
051    * @return A new store.
052    */
053   public static InMemorySessionStore create() {
054      return new InMemorySessionStore(DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES, Clock.systemUTC());
055   }
056
057   /**
058    * Static creator with a custom size cap.
059    *
060    * @param maxEntries The maximum number of live sessions.  Must be positive.
061    * @return A new store.
062    */
063   public static InMemorySessionStore create(int maxEntries) {
064      return new InMemorySessionStore(maxEntries, Clock.systemUTC());
065   }
066
067   private final int maxEntries;
068   private final Clock clock;
069   private final Map<String,OidcSession> byId;
070   private final Map<String,Set<String>> bySubject = new HashMap<>();
071   private final Map<String,Set<String>> bySid = new HashMap<>();
072   private final Object lock = new Object();
073
074   /**
075    * Constructor.
076    *
077    * @param maxEntries The maximum number of live sessions.  Must be positive.
078    * @param clock The clock used for TTL comparisons.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
079    */
080   public InMemorySessionStore(int maxEntries, Clock clock) {
081      assertArg(maxEntries > 0, "maxEntries must be positive (was {0})", maxEntries);
082      this.maxEntries = maxEntries;
083      this.clock = assertArgNotNull("clock", clock);
084      this.byId = new LinkedHashMap<>(16, 0.75f, true) {
085         private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
086         @Override
087         protected boolean removeEldestEntry(Map.Entry<String,OidcSession> eldest) {
088            if (size() > InMemorySessionStore.this.maxEntries) {
089               unindex(eldest.getValue());
090               return true;
091            }
092            return false;
093         }
094      };
095   }
096
097   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
098   public String createSessionCookieValue(OidcSession session) {
099      assertArgNotNull("session", session);
100      synchronized (lock) {
101         byId.put(session.id(), session);
102         bySubject.computeIfAbsent(session.subject(), k -> new HashSet<>()).add(session.id());
103         session.sid().ifPresent(sid -> bySid.computeIfAbsent(sid, k -> new HashSet<>()).add(session.id()));
104      }
105      return session.id();
106   }
107
108   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
109   public Optional<OidcSession> lookup(String cookieValue) {
110      assertArgNotNull("cookieValue", cookieValue);
111      synchronized (lock) {
112         var s = byId.get(cookieValue);
113         if (s == null)
114            return oe();
115         if (s.isExpired(clock.instant())) {
116            removeById(cookieValue);
117            return oe();
118         }
119         return o(s);
120      }
121   }
122
123   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
124   public void invalidate(String cookieValue) {
125      assertArgNotNull("cookieValue", cookieValue);
126      synchronized (lock) {
127         removeById(cookieValue);
128      }
129   }
130
131   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
132   public boolean supportsServerSideRevocation() {
133      return true;
134   }
135
136   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
137   public int invalidateBySubject(String subject) {
138      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("subject", subject);
139      synchronized (lock) {
140         var ids = bySubject.get(subject);
141         if (ids == null)
142            return 0;
143         var count = 0;
144         for (var id : new ArrayList<>(ids))
145            count += removeById(id) ? 1 : 0; // HTT: false branch requires index/map inconsistency
146         return count;
147      }
148   }
149
150   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
151   public int invalidateBySessionId(String sid) {
152      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("sid", sid);
153      synchronized (lock) {
154         var ids = bySid.get(sid);
155         if (ids == null)
156            return 0;
157         var count = 0;
158         for (var id : new ArrayList<>(ids))
159            count += removeById(id) ? 1 : 0; // HTT: false branch requires index/map inconsistency
160         return count;
161      }
162   }
163
164   /**
165    * Returns the current live-session count.  Primarily for tests and metrics.
166    *
167    * @return The session count.
168    */
169   public int size() {
170      synchronized (lock) {
171         return byId.size();
172      }
173   }
174
175   private boolean removeById(String id) {
176      var removed = byId.remove(id);
177      if (removed == null)
178         return false;
179      unindex(removed);
180      return true;
181   }
182
183   private void unindex(OidcSession s) {
184      var subjects = bySubject.get(s.subject());
185      if (subjects != null) { // HTT: null branch requires map inconsistency
186         subjects.remove(s.id());
187         if (subjects.isEmpty())
188            bySubject.remove(s.subject());
189      }
190      s.sid().ifPresent(sid -> {
191         var sids = bySid.get(sid);
192         if (sids != null) { // HTT: null branch requires map inconsistency
193            sids.remove(s.id());
194            if (sids.isEmpty())
195               bySid.remove(sid);
196         }
197      });
198   }
199}
